indicators.name: couch
indicators.rationale: The presence of a couch suggests a living area rather than a workspace.

indicators.name: rug
indicators.rationale: The rug is too large and covers most of the floor, making it difficult to set up a flat work surface.

indicators.name: sea view
indicators.rationale: A view of the sea can be distracting and may reduce concentration.

indicators.name: ceiling lights
indicators.rationale: Ambient ceiling lights may create glare on computer screens.

indicators.name: potted plants
indicators.rationale: Potted plants can be distracting and may require maintenance.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo). The presence of a couch, rug, sea view, ceiling lights, and potted plants all contribute to distractions and make it difficult to set up a flat work surface. However, the open layout and the presence of a table suggest some potential for productivity if rearranged.
